titleStmt.title: SII 24.46: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 46. (A.R. No. 168 of 1951-52.) NĀḺIKĒṬṬĀṈVĀŚAL, TIERS.

summary.p: Partly covered by brass plates. Seems to refer to an enquiry into and the settlement of arrears by Rājēndrachōḻa Mūvēndavēḷār, the arrears amounting to 940 kāśu by some individuals to the temple treasuries. One of the individuals (name lost) involved in the case seems to have served a period of imprisonment. A fragment apparently not connected with this record but on the same tiers refers to the provisions made for observing the Pūśattirunāḷ of Kulōttuṅga chōḻadēva every month.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Considerable portions of the inscribed tiers are covered up by brass plates.n pāratāyan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇan śrīkṛṣṇan Āḻvān paṇṭārattu
mekku toḷāyirattu nāṟpatu kācu kaṭavanāyc ciṟaiyirunta pāratāyan tiruva
ceykira rājentracoḻa muventaveḷār kaṇakkuk keṭṭu kaṭamaika

paṇṭārattu kaṭavanellu Arunūṟṟu kalattāl kaṭava kācu Aṟupatum Ivan tampi tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇan tiruvaraṅkatevan yicipaṇṭārattu kaṭava kaṭamaiyāṟ kācu nāṟpattiraṇṭum Ā
ṭinārāyaṇanaiyum poṟ paṇṭārak kaṭamaikku nānūṟṟu nāṟpattu munṟe (munṟe) mukkāl kācu kaṭava pāratāyan tiruvaraṅkan puruṣottamanai yi ci paṇṭārak kaṭamaikku Aiympattiraṇṭu kācu ka
ṉāvar Ivarkaḷ viṇṇappañ ceytu tiruvāy moḻintaruḷinapaṭi ceyvanenṟiruntu Ivarkaḷai Oru niyogaminṟiyey tanakkuttāne taṅkaḷur ṇan pāratāyan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇan śrīkṛṣṇa

eḻuttum puravuvari tinaikkalatuk kaṇakkuk keṭṭamai Ikkācu vilai tanta Ivūrnilam koṭittoṭṭam Āṟāṅkaṇṭattu kāṇi muntiri
rikaiyum kamukan toppum jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻan nilam Oru(ā)mā Araikkāṇikkīḻ mukkāle munṟumāvum Iṅke tentalai nir nilaippaḷḷattu nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ yum Eṭṭāva
mānāna pulattu Onpatu mākkāṇi Araikkāṇi kīḻ mukkāle mūṉṟu mā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ nālu māvum Eṭṭāṅ kaṇṭattu nilam muntirikaik kiḻ kāle Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum munṟāṅkaṇṭattu pāratāyan tirumaḻapāṭi ṇaiper kiḻ ninṟum Oṟṟi
kāṇiyum Ārāṅkaṇṭattu nilam Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiyey nālu māvum Āka nilam Araiyey mākāṇik kiḻ mākāṇi Araikkāṇiyum cakravattikaḷ śrī kolottu ṅkacoḻadevar pūcat tirunāḷ māsantoṟum ceykaikku vanta mottamum tirumañcanaThe rest is built in.
Digital edition of SII 24.46 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
